name: TRUIST FINANCIAL CORP
summary: Truist Financial Corporation is a bank holding company that provides a wide range of financial products and services through its subsidiary Truist Bank, a North Carolina-chartered bank. Its offerings include consumer and small business banking, wholesale banking, mortgage services, loan origination, deposit accounts, investment securities, and insurance-related services. It operates two primary segments: Consumer and Small Business Banking (CSBB) and Wholesale Banking (WB).
